subtitle.zh: 我不使用 AI 取代工程，而是用 AI 放大工程能力。
subtitle.en: I do not use AI to replace engineering. I use AI to amplify engineering.

title.zh: AI 如何改變軟體工程

zh: AI 大幅降低了實作層的成本，但並未降低架構設計與工程判斷的價值。
當程式碼產出速度提升 10 倍，瓶頸從「寫程式」轉移到「寫對程式」——需求釐清、架構設計、品質審查變得更加關鍵。
AI-native 開發不是讓 AI 寫完整個系統，而是在明確的工程框架下，讓 AI 處理可預測的重複工作，工程師專注於決策與品質。
en: AI dramatically lowers the cost of implementation, but does not reduce the value of architecture design and engineering judgement.
When code output speeds up 10×, the bottleneck shifts from "writing code" to "writing the right code" — requirements, architecture, and quality review become more critical.
AI-native development is not letting AI build entire systems. It is using AI for predictable, repetitive work within a clear engineering framework, while engineers focus on decisions and quality.

zh: 需求分析
架構設計
技術規格
AI 輔助實作
審查與重構
測試與交付
en: Requirement Analysis
Architecture Design
Technical Specification
AI-assisted Implementation
Review & Refactoring
Testing & Delivery

zh: 每個專案都遵循「架構先行」原則：在寫第一行程式碼之前，模組邊界、API 契約與資料流必須已定義。
AI 只在規格明確的階段介入，用於加速樣板程式碼、測試骨架與文件產出。
en: Every project follows an "architecture first" principle: module boundaries, API contracts, and data flow must be defined before the first line of code.
AI intervenes only when specs are clear — accelerating boilerplate, test scaffolding, and documentation.

zh: 我會先畫出系統模組圖、定義 API 介面、撰寫技術規格文件，再開始實作。
這確保 AI 產出的程式碼有明確的歸屬與約束，不會偏離整體設計。
對 Junior 工程師而言，清晰的架構也是最好的 onboarding 材料。
en: I start with system module diagrams, API interface definitions, and technical specification documents before implementation.
This ensures AI-generated code has clear ownership and constraints, staying aligned with the overall design.
For junior engineers, a clear architecture is also the best onboarding material.

zh: 需求探索與方案比較：在架構設計階段，用於評估技術選型與權衡分析。
技術規格撰寫：產出 API 文件草稿、資料模型設計、錯誤處理策略。
知識補充：快速理解新技術棧的可行性與限制。
不直接用於：產出未經審查的生產程式碼。
en: Requirements exploration and trade-off analysis during architecture design.
Technical specification drafting: API docs, data models, error handling strategies.
Knowledge supplementation: quickly understanding feasibility and constraints of new tech stacks.
Not used for: producing unreviewed production code.

zh: 在已定義的架構與規格下，加速模組實作、測試撰寫與重構。
透過 .cursorrules 與專案上下文，引導 AI 遵循既定的程式碼風格與架構模式。
批次處理重複性工作：CRUD 端點、資料轉換層、單元測試骨架。
每次 AI 產出都經過人工審查，確認符合架構原則後才合併。
en: Accelerate module implementation, test writing, and refactoring within defined architecture and specs.
Use .cursorrules and project context to guide AI toward established code style and architecture patterns.
Batch repetitive work: CRUD endpoints, data transformation layers, unit test scaffolding.
Every AI output is human-reviewed and merged only after confirming alignment with architecture principles.

title.zh: 我如何審查 AI 產出的程式碼

zh: 架構一致性：是否符合已定義的模組邊界與 API 契約？
錯誤處理：邊界條件、例外路徑是否完整？
安全性：是否有硬編碼憑證、未驗證輸入、不當的權限控制？
可維護性：命名、抽象層次、依賴方向是否合理？
可測試性：是否易於撰寫單元測試與整合測試？
en: Architecture consistency: does it align with defined module boundaries and API contracts?
Error handling: are edge cases and exception paths complete?
Security: hardcoded credentials, unvalidated input, improper access control?
Maintainability: naming, abstraction levels, dependency direction?
Testability: easy to write unit and integration tests?

title.zh: AI 如何改善團隊 Onboarding

zh: 清晰的架構文件 + AI 輔助的程式碼範例，讓 Junior 工程師能快速理解模組職責。
可重用的 API 模組與 OpenAPI 規格，降低「從零開始」的學習曲線。
AI 會議助理專案即是實例：架構與 scaffold 定義完成後，Junior 工程師即可接手功能實作。
en: Clear architecture docs + AI-assisted code examples help juniors quickly understand module responsibilities.
Reusable API modules and OpenAPI specs reduce the "start from scratch" learning curve.
The AI Meeting Assistant project is a case in point: once architecture and scaffold were defined, juniors could immediately take over feature implementation.

title.zh: 人主導決策，AI 輔助執行

description.zh: 架構、技術選型、品質標準由工程師定義；AI 在框架內加速實作。
description.en: Architecture, technology choices, and quality standards are defined by engineers; AI accelerates within that framework.

description.zh: 沒有明確規格，就不啟動 AI 輔助實作。
description.en: No clear spec, no AI-assisted implementation.

description.zh: AI 產出的每一行程式碼都經過工程師審查。
description.en: Every line of AI-generated code is reviewed by an engineer.

title.zh: 可維護性優於交付速度

description.zh: 快速產出但難以維護的程式碼，不是真正的加速。
description.en: Fast output that is hard to maintain is not real acceleration.
